name: The Education 'Waiting Room' Alternative (Direct-to-Work Bridge)
description: Recent graduates (CS particularly) and seasoned professionals (Journalism) are experiencing a total disconnect between effort (150+ apps) and results (0 interviews). This leads to 'Panic Degrees'—applying for Masters or returning to Community College purely because they 'have no other choice,' not because they want the education.
pain_points: Applying to hundreds of jobs with zero response
Taking on debt for a Masters degree out of fear, not desire
Extreme depression and feeling 'directionless' despite having a degree
tech_stack: Polygon (Ethereum L2) for verifiable skill ledgers
OpenAI GPT-4o API for dynamic supervisor simulation
